content.theorem: TypeScript + HMR enables idea-to-running-code in under 60 seconds for visualization and API prototyping
content.proof: Vite's HMR updates modules in <50ms. TypeScript incremental compilation is near-instant for small files. The feedback loop is: think, type, save, see. No compile step, no deploy step, no refresh. For Eisenstein visualization: change the lattice parameters, watch the canvas update in real time.
content.benchmark: Idea to running visualization: 45 seconds. API prototype to testable endpoint: 90 seconds. Hot reload: 47ms average.
content.caveat: Rapid prototyping is not production. The prototype exists to validate the concept. Then the Fortran chamber optimizes it for real.
